anchor_comparator.downstream_value: First credible white-box model and foundation for refinement.
anchor_comparator.implementation: Must be reproduced from paper into Python/SymPy predictor in repos/topic-main.
anchor_comparator.main_risk: Ignores L2/HBM, TMA latency, occupancy; needs calibration.
anchor_comparator.metric_fit: Direct forward-pass roofline on Blackwell (MMA, SMEM, exponential).
anchor_comparator.name: FlashAttention-4 Paper Roofline Model

sections.recommended_next_action: Route to isomer-deepsci-baseline and reproduce the FA4 paper roofline model, then extend with B200 memory/occupancy terms and validate against measured B200 runtime.

rejected.name: cuDNN 9.13 / Triton Attention
rejected.reason: Closed-source or different kernels; only indirect plausibility checks.

rejected.name: SageAttention family
rejected.reason: Targets consumer GPUs and quantization outside B200 datacenter scope.

sanity_checks.metric_fit: Lower-bound baseline the white-box model should beat.
sanity_checks.name: Naive Max(Compute, Memory) Roofline

sanity_checks.implementation: Build and run repo benchmark scripts; collect NCU.
sanity_checks.main_risk: Direct measurement leakage if used for predictions.
sanity_checks.name: Measured B200 Kernel Runtime

summary: Comparator candidates for the Flash Attention 4 white-box runtime model on NVIDIA B200.
title: Baseline Shortlist
